- **CU-002:** 0.12 mg/kg × 9.1 kg = **1.09 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**
- **CU-003:** 0.18 mg/kg × 15.7 kg = **2.83 mg**, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**

On PK stability: **nothing in the dosing config suggests a problem**. But to be precise, this is only a static parameter file, so I **can’t verify live PK model health** from it alone.

If you want, I can also reformat this into a shorter clinician-facing note.
